title: cydonia cydonia var. oblonga
intro: Cydonia cydonia var. oblonga, also known as quince, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that is a variety of the Cydonia cydonia species. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of quince include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. Quince is commonly prepared in herbal teas, jams, and jellies, and is also used in the production of quince paste, a sweet spread used in Mediterranean cuisine.
